mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY inner_q.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT v.post_id AS postId, v.nickname AS writerDisplayName, v.handle AS writerHandle, v.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS writerHatiCode, v.account_id AS writerAccountId, up.gender AS writerGender, v.created_at AS created_at, TO_CHAR(v.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAtStr, v.content AS content, v.like_count AS likeCount, v.comment_count AS commentCount, v.view_count AS viewCount,
CASE WHEN #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_bookmarks pb WHERE pb.post_id = v.post_id AND pb.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bookmarked,
CASE WHEN #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = v.post_id AND pl.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked,
0 AS pinned
FROM SCOTT.vw_posts_with_counts v LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_profile up ON up.account_id = v.account_id ) inner_q ) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + 1) AND (#{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{limit, jdbcType=NUMERIC})

SELECT v.post_id AS postId, v.nickname AS writerDisplayName, v.handle AS writerHandle, v.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS writerHatiCode, v.account_id AS writerAccountId, up.gender AS writerGender, TO_CHAR(v.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAtStr, v.content AS content, v.like_count AS likeCount, v.comment_count AS commentCount, v.view_count AS viewCount,
CASE WHEN #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_bookmarks pb WHERE pb.post_id = v.post_id AND pb.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bookmarked,
CASE WHEN #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = v.post_id AND pl.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked,
0 AS pinned
FROM SCOTT.vw_posts_with_counts v LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_profile up ON up.account_id = v.account_id WHERE v.post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT t.tag_text FROM SCOTT.tag_links tl JOIN SCOTT.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id WHERE tl.post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY t.tag_text
SELECT mf.url FROM SCOTT.media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'POST' AND mf.ref_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY mf.created_at ASC
SELECT mf.file_id AS mediaId, mf.url AS url FROM SCOTT.media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'POST' AND mf.ref_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY mf.created_at ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SCOTT.SEQ_POSTS.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO SCOTT.posts (post_id, account_id, content, created_at) VALUES ( #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO SCOTT.tag_links (tag_id, post_id) VALUES (#{tagId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SCOTT.tag_links WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM SCOTT.user_pinned_post WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM SCOTT.comments WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM SCOTT.not_interested WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM SCOTT.post_bookmarks WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM SCOTT.post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM SCOTT.view_count WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY
inner_q.likeCount DESC, inner_q.created_at DESC inner_q.created_at DESC
) AS rn FROM ( SELECT v.post_id AS postId, v.nickname AS writerDisplayName, v.handle AS writerHandle, v.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS writerHatiCode, v.account_id AS writerAccountId, up.gender AS writerGender,
v.created_at AS created_at, TO_CHAR(v.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAtStr, v.content AS content, v.like_count AS likeCount, v.comment_count AS commentCount, v.view_count AS viewCount,
CASE WHEN #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_bookmarks pb WHERE pb.post_id = v.post_id AND pb.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bookmarked,
CASE WHEN #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = v.post_id AND pl.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked,
0 AS pinned
FROM SCOTT.vw_posts_with_counts v LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_profile up ON up.account_id = v.account_id
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.tag_links tl JOIN SCOTT.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id WHERE tl.post_id = v.post_id AND t.tag_text LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' )
AND v.content LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%'
AND ( v.nickname LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR v.handle LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%'
)
AND ( v.content LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR v.nickname LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR v.handle LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.tag_links tl JOIN SCOTT.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id WHERE tl.post_id = v.post_id AND t.tag_text LIKE '%' || REPLACE(#{q}, '#', '') || '%' ) )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.tag_links tl JOIN SCOTT.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id WHERE tl.post_id = v.post_id AND t.tag_text = #{tag} )
AND up.hati_code IN
#{h}
) inner_q ) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + 1) AND (#{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{limit, jdbcType=NUMERIC})

SELECT v.post_id AS postId, v.nickname AS writerDisplayName, v.handle AS writerHandle, v.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS writerHatiCode, v.account_id AS writerAccountId, up.gender AS writerGender, TO_CHAR(v.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAtStr, v.content AS content, v.like_count AS likeCount, v.comment_count AS commentCount, v.view_count AS viewCount,
CASE WHEN #{viewerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_bookmarks pb WHERE pb.post_id = v.post_id AND pb.account_id = #{viewerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bookmarked,
CASE WHEN #{viewerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = v.post_id AND pl.account_id = #{viewerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked,
CASE WHEN upp.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS pinned
FROM SCOTT.vw_posts_with_counts v LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_profile up ON up.account_id = v.account_id LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_pinned_post upp ON upp.account_id = #{writerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND upp.post_id = v.post_id WHERE v.account_id = #{writerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY CASE WHEN upp.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, v.created_at DESC

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, mf.url AS imageUrl FROM SCOTT.posts p JOIN SCOTT.media_files mf ON mf.ref_type = 'POST' AND mf.ref_id = p.post_id WHERE p.account_id = #{writerAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, mf.created_at ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SCOTT.user_pinned_post t USING ( SELECT #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS account_id, #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS post_id FROM dual ) s ON (t.account_id = s.account_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.post_id = s.post_id WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (account_id, post_id) VALUES (s.account_id, s.post_id)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SCOTT.user_pinned_post WHERE account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
